title: Google Sheets/Drive: How do we see the date/last modified status of google drive in Monday
excerpt: I want to link a task to a google spreadsheet that is used by multiple people not directly connected to Monday.  I just need to see when that sheet is modified which google sheets keeps track of.  How do I import this da…

posts.author: neilvg (Neil Godbole)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to link a task to a google spreadsheet that is used by multiple people not directly connected to Monday. I just need to see when that sheet is modified which google sheets keeps track of. How do I import this data (date modified) into a column in Monday.com?

Thanks!
Neil

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Neil,

I believe this is a process that you’d need to integrate a 3rd party tool for. At this stage, we don’t have a integration with Google sheets/drive that natively can pull this data into the platform - I am sorry for the setback

posts.author: MASO (Markus @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @neilvg

I sadly can’t offer an easy solution out of the box at this point. But we are currently planning to implement some kind of two-way syncing feature in our Spreadsheet Gorilla app in between monday.com boards and Google Sheets.

Just in case you are interested, would you mind hopping on a short zoom call with us, to discuss your use case a bit more in detail? Feel free to book a call here, since we are keen to learn more and see if our plans might match your request.

– Markus from Gorilla Apps
